sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Showstopper
feat.text: Your twirling weapons create a grand distraction that's difficult to look away from. When using Pistol Twirl to Feint, you can target all enemies within your weapon's first range increment who you can perceive and who can see you. You roll one Deception check and compare it against each target's Perception DC.

traits.name: Gunslinger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.

archetype.name: Bullet Dancer
archetype.note: This archetype offers Showstopper at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Pistol Phenom
archetype.note: This archetype offers Showstopper at a different level than displayed here.
